last_commit: f9733eddf6abeaef4a54223d98e345c9a179a3bd apply changes from factory v 2.1

active_tasks.summary: Bridge resilience: add MediaDetailsListener to Java bridge for media_change events, graceful DLP session recovery without crash-restart. See live USB QA findings in docs/bugs/frontend.md.

Playlist sub-navigation still loops at deeper levels. Root (folder_id=0) works, but navigating into a specific playlist returns the same list. Java bridge requestPlaylistMenuFrom returns identical data for all folder IDs. Beat-link API research says it should work — may be XDJ-AZ-specific or a sort_order parameter issue.
Re-scan confirmation dialog: when scanning tracks that are already scanned, prompt user to skip or rescan. LOW priority.

hardware.dlp_identity: Both decks share Player 1. Player 2 browse commands fail.
hardware.device_announcements: 3 devices: Player 1, Player 2, XDJ-AZ (mixer). Mixer shares Player 1 device_number.

session_notes: Interactive QA + fix session with operator (Brach). Fixed 8 FE bugs (scroll wheel, XDJ-AZ dedup, scan dismiss, selection clear, shift-click, stem label, TRACK/PLAYLIST routing). USB hot-swap QA revealed asymmetric slot behavior: slot 1 removal corrupts DLP for all slots, slot 2 removal handled gracefully. Bridge crash is the only DLP recovery mechanism — needs resilience work. Key pipeline feedback: (1) agents should self-test UI before asking operator, (2) context handoff between agents is broken — prior agents didn't record hardware model, column semantics, or UX requirements, (3) 'other' stem means different things per tier (Live=full mix, Standard=demucs synth/fx). TypeScript strict passes. All fixes are uncommitted.

fixes_applied.scroll_wheel_bleed: Replaced React onWheel (passive) with native addEventListener('wheel', ..., {passive: false}) in WaveformCanvas, ArrangementMap, AnnotationTimeline
fixes_applied.xdj_az_triple_device: Deduplicated cdjDevices by device_number in HardwareTab
fixes_applied.scan_progress_dismiss: Added onDismiss prop + X button to ScanProgressPanel when terminal
fixes_applied.selection_clear: useEffect watches scanProgress status, clears selectedTrackIds on completed/failed
fixes_applied.shift_click: Added lastClickedIndex ref, toggleTrack accepts (id, index, shiftKey), range select on shift
fixes_applied.stem_label: STEM_LABELS map in ArrangementMap render: other → synth/fx
fixes_applied.track_menu: UsbBrowser flatMode state: TRACK clicks use browse_all_tracks instead of browse_folder
fixes_applied.playlist_root: UsbBrowser PLAYLIST clicks use folder_id=0 instead of menu item ID. Unsupported menus greyed out with 'coming soon'
